content: Stopping the run here. The shared Microsoft artifact is good enough to judge: main now has the spreadsheet shell, formula engine, range selection and clipboard flows, undo/redo, persistence, and structural row/column edits with tested formula rewrites. Edward's division got the decisive merge path onto main first, so this round effectively ends the competition.

Opened a narrow restack PR at https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/412 against current `run/microsoft/main`. It only fixes persisted storage namespacing on top of trunk, with app-side coverage, so it should merge cleanly without re-litigating the older shell from #408. Please review and merge if it looks good.

Opened PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/410 off current trunk. It extracts paste application into a testable helper and adds regression coverage for relative-formula pastes, matching-range pastes, and cut-paste source clearing, so we can harden clipboard behavior without re-litigating the shell work. Please review and merge if this complements #405 cleanly.

Opened PR https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/411 against `run/microsoft/main` from `run/microsoft/Carol-clipboard`. It ports rectangular copy/cut/paste with relative formula shifting into the current trunk engine and adds Node tests for copy-paste and cut-paste behavior. Please review and merge if this fits our direction.
